evals.prompt: 用 video-producer 从一个想法开始做 90 秒竖屏视频：AI 视频不是工具而是生产线。先产出 creative brief、art direction、storyboard、shotlist、asset manifest，不要渲染。
evals.expected_output: Creates staged artifacts with art direction, rich storyboard shots, camera movement, visual metaphors, asset manifest, and review checkpoint.

evals.prompt: 第 2 段太像 PPT，画面太空洞，颜色和图标都很少。请只修改必要的上游文件，不要从头生成。
evals.expected_output: Identifies storyboard/shotlist/art direction/assets as earliest affected artifacts, creates versioned revisions, lists downstream impact, and runs aesthetic scoring.

evals.prompt: 只制作 storyboard 里的 003_summary HyperFrames 段落。要求画面有层次、运镜、图标和粒子，不要只有文字卡片。
evals.expected_output: Reads art direction, tokens, shotlist, asset manifest; creates segment brief/styleframe/expanded prompt; includes depth layers, camera motion, assets, timing, anti-PPT measures, and validation steps.

evals.prompt: 这条视频画面还可以，但声音很空、BGM 不搭、转场没有记忆点。请使用 video-producer 只优化音效/音乐/TTS/混音，不重写 research 和 storyboard。
evals.expected_output: Loads sound-design references, revises audio_style_guide/music_brief/voice_profile/audio_cue_sheet/audio_mix_plan, records rights, runs dependency_report and audio_score, and explains where each cue should sync.

evals.prompt: 写一个关于某 AI 公司访问限制争议的 2 分钟中文视频脚本。要求每个事实句都有 claim_id，不能把 foreign national 曲解成所有人，给出可核查的 source_cards 和 claim_ledger。
evals.expected_output: Creates source cards, claim ledger with interpretation guardrails, colloquial script with [Cxxx] tags, and runs or recommends script_claim_lint before beat design.

evals.prompt: 这段口播太像 PPT，请把每句话拆成逐秒动画事件，并给出资产编舞和音效绑定。
evals.expected_output: Creates narration_beats, beat_timeline, director_event_graph, asset_choreography_manifest, and event-anchored audio_cue_sheet with beat_timeline_lint gate.

evals.prompt: 参考小白debug风格，把一个 AI 工具教程做成有 UI 证据、扁平 SVG、红箭头、代码框、字幕和音效的 HyperFrames 片段。
evals.expected_output: Loads xiaobai-debug style DNA, uses UI proof plus light-grid diagram alternation, programmatic Chinese text, asset actors, timestamped expanded prompt, and anti-copy/rights cautions.
